description:
Add support for launching pi (pi.dev) as an alternative worker agent alongside opencode. Pi is a lighter, more flexible terminal coding harness with 15+ providers and structured JSON output.

Scope:
- Add 'pi' as a new agent type in AgentConfig (alongside 'opencode' and 'acp')
- Create agent_command.py (or extend opencode.py) to build pi commands
- Update resume.py _inject_contract() to use pi CLI flags instead of heredoc when agent type is 'pi'
- Support pi-specific config: pi_args, provider/model selection, thinking level
- Config example: [agent.build] type = pi, pi_args = --no-session --thinking high

This is a config-driven swap — no architectural changes needed. Pi uses the same tmux pane model as opencode.
title: Add pi as worker agent backend
